meta.title: Final Expense Referrals | Isaac Plans
meta.description: Request a review and capture referrals for final expense
meta.keywords: final expense, referrals, review, Senior Life

review.switchDescription: Ask the client to leave a review (e.g. Google, Trustpilot). Mark complete once you've requested it.
review.pendingText: Click when you've asked for the review

capture.switchDescription: Capture referral names and contact info. Mark complete once you've recorded the referrals.
capture.pendingText: Click when you've captured the referrals
